origins.examplepack.pyromancer.name: Pyromancer
origins.examplepack.pyromancer.descripti: Born of flame — fire cannot harm them, but water is their undoing.
origins.examplepack.golem.name: Golem
origins.examplepack.golem.description: A living construct of iron and stone, slow but nearly indestructible.
origins.examplepack.specter.name: Specter
origins.examplepack.specter.description: An ethereal being that slips between the living world and the void.
origins.examplepack.paladin.name: Paladin
origins.examplepack.paladin.description: A holy warrior empowered by armor and the hunt for undead.
origins.examplepack.void_knight.name: Void Knight
origins.examplepack.void_knight.descript: A guardian of the End. Picking this origin warps you to an End City — and sends you back there on death if you have no bed.
power.examplepack.pyromancer_fire_immuni: Immune to fire, lava, and all burning damage.
power.examplepack.pyromancer_heat_vision: Sees in the dark through the heat of the world.
power.examplepack.pyromancer_strength.de: Permanently empowered by inner fire — deals more melee damage.
power.examplepack.pyromancer_fire_damage: Deals 50% more fire damage to enemies.
power.examplepack.pyromancer_water_weakn: Takes 2.5x damage from water and drowning.
power.examplepack.golem_armor.name: Iron Skin
power.examplepack.golem_armor.descriptio: Has 6 points of natural armor without wearing equipment.
power.examplepack.golem_slow_movement.de: Moves 20% slower than a normal player.
power.examplepack.golem_no_fall_damage.d: Takes no damage from falling, no matter the height.
Immune to poison and wither effects.
power.examplepack.golem_no_slowdown.name: Unstoppable
power.examplepack.golem_no_slowdown.desc: Not slowed by cobwebs, berry bushes, or other dense blocks.
power.examplepack.golem_scare_creepers.d: Creepers are terrified and flee on sight.
power.examplepack.specter_flight.name: Ethereal Flight
power.examplepack.specter_flight.descrip: Can fly freely through the air without an elytra.
power.examplepack.specter_elytra_boost.d: Can glide with elytra without wearing one.
power.examplepack.specter_phantom_form.d: Becomes invisible, though gravity still holds sway.
power.examplepack.specter_water_breathin: Does not need to breathe underwater.
power.examplepack.specter_no_sprint_food: Sprinting does not drain extra hunger.
Can cling to and scale any solid wall.
power.examplepack.specter_scare_endermen: Endermen recognize a kindred spirit and refuse to fight.
power.examplepack.specter_tick_action.de: Teleports away from danger when struck.
power.examplepack.specter_no_fall_base.d: Passes through the air without suffering fall damage.
power.examplepack.specter_conditional_fa: Takes no fall damage while clinging to walls.
Wearing any helmet grants +1 melee damage.
power.examplepack.paladin_smite_vigor.de: Striking undead restores half a heart.
power.examplepack.paladin_holy_mark.name: Holy Mark
power.examplepack.paladin_holy_mark.desc: Undead you hit briefly glow with holy light.
power.examplepack.void_knight_end_ward.d: Grants +2 armor while in The End.
origins.examplepack.netherborn.name: Netherborn
origins.examplepack.netherborn.descripti: Forged in infernal fire. Spawns at a Nether Fortress with a fire-aspect blade and cooked rations.
power.examplepack.netherborn_fire_immuni: Immune to fire, lava, and magma damage.
power.examplepack.netherborn_nether_spee: Moves faster while in any Nether biome.
power.examplepack.netherborn_starting_sw: Starts with a Fire Aspect I stone sword.
origins.examplepack.tidecaller.name: Tidecaller
origins.examplepack.tidecaller.descripti: A child of the ocean. Spawns beneath the waves with a Loyalty trident and the gift of deep breath.
power.examplepack.tidecaller_ocean_speed: Swims with Dolphin's Grace whenever in water.
power.examplepack.tidecaller_starting_tr: Starts with a Loyalty I trident.
power.examplepack.tidecaller_drowning_bo: Active: fire a bolt that drowns hostile mobs in a 5-block radius where it lands. 10s cooldown.
origins.examplepack.hearth_keeper.name: Hearth Keeper
origins.examplepack.hearth_keeper.descri: A traveler from a homestead — spawns with rations, seeds, and saplings, and coaxes crops to grow faster.
